tool_args.content:
# Backup previous state
Copy-Item -Path 'C:\AI_VAULT\00_identity\brain_server.py' -Destination 'C:\AI_VAULT\00_identity\brain_server_backup.py'

# Apply the brain episode patch
Patch-Apply -Path 'C:\AI_VAULT\00_identity\brain_server.py' -Diff 'c:\ai_vault\tmp_agent\state\rooms\room_autobuild_20260303_212443\patches\brain_episode_v1.diff'

# Compile Python files
py_compile.compile('C:\AI_VAULT\00_identity\brain_server.py')

# Run smoke tests
Invoke-Expression 'C:\AI_VAULT\tmp_agent\state\rooms\room_autobuild_20260303_212443\patches\smoke_p3_1.ps1'
